---
id: create-lock-log
title: "Create lock log"
description: "Reports lock activity back to KISS after a tenant interacts with an NFC lock. Call this after every NFC tap attempt (successful or failed)."
sidebar_label: "Create lock log"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/kiss-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create lock log"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/locks/{lock_id}/logs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Reports lock activity back to KISS after a tenant interacts with an NFC lock. Call this after every NFC tap attempt (successful or failed).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
